styles.body: font-sans text-base leading-relaxed bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1C0F0A] via-[#3B1F1A] to-[#0F172A] text-[#FDE68A] antialiased
styles.h1: text-5xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F97316] to-[#FACC15] text-transparent bg-clip-text mb-10
styles.select: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-md text-[#fff] bg-[#1C0F0A]/90
styles.checkbox: relative w-6 h-6 bg-[#2A140F] border-[#F97316] border-2 peer-checked:bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F97316] to-[#FACC15]
styles.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#7C2D12] rounded-lg bg-[#2A140F]/80 text-[#FED7AA] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FACC15] focus:border-[#FACC15] backdrop-blur
styles.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#7C2D12] rounded-lg bg-[#2A140F]/80 text-[#FED7AA] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FACC15] focus:border-[#FACC15] backdrop-blur
styles.button: px-4 py-2 rounded bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F97316] to-[#FACC15] text-black
